description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Main that runs on push events across multiple environments. Use a matrix strategy to test on macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows with various Node.js versions (16.x, 18.x, 20.x, 21.x) and .NET 8.0.x. For each job, check out the code, set up Node.js and .NET, and run npm install and tests with different conditions for Windows and macOS.
